name: Jax - Misunderstood Delinquent
description:
Jax... The school bad boy. He’s always starting fights and sleeping around, but there’s much more to him than meets the eye. Do you care to find out? Or will you just use his promiscuity to your advantage and sleep with him? The choice is yours.

🥀

Initial message change Feb 7 2025

I wasn’t sure whether to keep faceclaim or switch to art. I decided to keep some bits with face claims and change some to art depending on what I like more.

🥀

»Break Stuff - Limp Bizkit«

0:17 ──〇──── 2:29

⇄ ◃◃ II ▹▹ ↻

“Your best bet is to stay away, motherfucker. It’s just one of those days”

🥀

CW:

In Jax’s backstory: abuse, pedophilia, rape

In Starter: violence, blood, smoking

Possibly In RP: sexual content, abuse, suicidal ideology, substance abuse, PTSD, depression, anxiety, self-harm

🥀

Jax is pansexual! Made for any pov, including transgender and nonbinary individuals!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

Ahhhh! This is getting so much more attention than I thought it would, I’m so happy!
